category_sources: source_facts.description says Z39.50 proxy and router utilizing Yaz toolkit; official Index Data manual describes Metaproxy as a universal router, proxy, and encapsulated metasearcher for Z39.50 and SRU.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is metaproxy; official Index Data software page and manual use Metaproxy.
docs_sources: Official Index Data documentation provides Metaproxy introduction, installation, and reference pages.
repo_sources: No official public source-control repository was identified from source_facts or official Index Data documentation; source_facts.source-archive is an official tarball but not a source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Z39.50 proxy/router and Yaz toolkit; official manual documents Z39.50/SRU proxy and routing behavior.
